review_title: Robust, intuitive, a great value
description: My experience has been excellent. EnginRooms suite of tools are robust enough to support substantial analytical work, including DOE, yet the platform remains intuitive and offers helpful prompts for new users. It delivers exceptional value.
author: Robert S.
pros: As a Lean Six Sigma trainer and coach, I value how EngineRoom is designed to guide a user through their problem-solving journey. The tool selection suggestions for each stage of DMAIC are right on point.
cons: Like many browser‑based applications, it has a few usability quirks. At times, browser settings may need adjustment to display all interface options. I’d also welcome future enhancements that make exporting visualizations more seamless.
author_profession: Coach - Trainer - LSS Master Black Belt

review_title: EngineRoom: More Than a Data Tool—A Complete Continuous Improvement Platform”
description: Very user-friendly, good support structure, reliable software, helpful features, full integration with MoreSteam training programs and their simulation software. EngineRoom is very user centric.
author: Bart S.
pros: I have been using EngineRoom for the past five years, and it is an outstanding product for supporting continuous improvement initiatives. It is much more than a powerful data analysis tool; it also helps structure the thinking process required to move effectively from problem definition to solution. Compared to other products, EngineRoom is highly user-friendly, with very intuitive navigation. Customer support is excellent, and the overall support structure is outstanding. Additional information is easy to find, and the free webinars offered by MoreSteam are both practical and valuable. Data management within EngineRoom is straightforward and provides a clear overview. A significant advantage is that EngineRoom does not require installation on company servers and runs entirely via the web. This eliminates dependence on local IT departments, which can often slow down implementation. The cost of EngineRoom is favorable compared to competing solutions, and the seamless integration with MoreSteam’s training programs is a major benefit. Finally, EngineRoom is continuously evolving, with new features added on a regular basis. One example is the interactive help function “Hexie”, which I find particularly useful.
cons: If you are used to software of the competition is takes a bit of effort to get used to EngineRoom...which is understandable since it is a different product. The adaption period was short and easy for me since the structure is clear. But it will require a bit of a different way of thinking.

review_title: Very good tools, but needs continuous improvement to meet customer expectations
description: Experience has been excellent in learning lean sigma tools that can do in minutes that would take hours in Google Sheet or Excel
author: Mark K.
pros: User tech support by email is very responsive Toolset is extremely helpful for small lean sigma projects The simulation tool is amazing for as-is & to-be process modeling The new & well-intentioned "Wexie" AI helper chatbot is sometimes accurate; and often directionally correct.
cons: User Interface [UI] is buggy; data sets need to be small; additional preprocessing is often needed in Google Sheet or Excel
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: MoreSteam EngineRoom: A Must-Have for Continuous Improvement Practitioners
description: 100% satisfied, ER meets all the critical to quality characteristics for our organization. Which I can easily map out in a CTQC tree in EnginerRoom!
author: Kim K.
pros: MoreSteam EngineRoom is a must have for continuous improvement practitioners. What sets it apart is how seamlessly it integrates all the tools needed, from basic data analysis, process maps, charter development, to advanced statistical methods, into one intuitive, easy-to-use platform. I find so easy to use, whether you're a White Belt just getting started or a seasoned Black Belt, EngineRoom makes learning and applying Lean Six Sigma tools straightforward and effective. EngineRoom is more than just a toolbox. The inclusion of critical thinking questions throughout the platform guides users through the problem-solving process in a structured and thoughtful way. This makes it an excellent learning tool as well as a practical one. This makes teaching classes as a Master Black Belt so much more effective. The customer support is top-notch, and I truly appreciate how MoreSteam consistently seeks user feedback and uses it to enhance the platform. They’re not just offering software; they’re building a continually improving the experience. EngineRoom combines multiple software into one, creating exceptional value. Highly recommended for any organization committed to driving operational excellence.
cons: That some people don't understand that everything you can do in other packages can be done in EngineRoom.

review_title: Powerful Tool for Data-Driven Decision Making with Room to Grow
description: EngineRoom has been a valuable tool in our operational improvement projects. It simplifies complex statistical analysis and makes process improvement data more accessible for non-technical users. With integrated dashboards and clean visualization, it’s easy to present data to stakeholders. While there are areas for improvement—particularly in advanced features and support—the overall value for money is strong. We've been able to drive measurable improvements in quality and efficiency thanks to the insights EngineRoom helped us uncover.
author: Nageshwar P.
pros: Intuitive user interface and easy navigation across statistical tools Great selection of templates and data analysis functions Dashboards are clean and customizable Excellent for Lean Six Sigma and continuous improvement projects Cloud-based access allows for easy team collaboration It is Value for Money
cons: Some advanced statistical features require manual calculation or external tools Limited flexibility in visual customization (chart styles, themes, etc.) Learning curve can be a bit steep for users without a statistics background Customer support response time could be faster

review_title: Engineroom. A modern upgrade from Minitab.
description: We are very happy that we made the switch from Minitab to Engineroom because of the better cost and it's integration with Traction.
author: Joshua K.
pros: Engineroom is extremely user friendly and is very straightforward for our project owners to use. The support team is very helpful as well.
cons: There is not much to list as far as cons for Engineroom. It is very well integrated with Traction. It is not user customizable which might be an issue for some.

review_title: A Utility Tool that gets you places - Engine Room
description: An overall excellent experience with the tool and I would highly recommend it to aspiring corporates/collogues. I've gained much more deeper insights on the uniquely designed tools and features and helps a lot in my professional path.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Engine room is a one-stop solution with value for money solutions for the corporates. It enables Lean Six Sigma tool, seamlessly embedded in Excel or through a cloud‑based mechanism, well suited for DMAIC and other improvement methodologies A super useful tool to the highly motivated engineers to collaborate and enhance effectiveness
cons: I feel it needs a bit more enhancements in the data dashboards, although the learning curve designed on the tool is very effective to precisely understand and obtain data analysis Not yet used the dashboard data feature, but it seems to be not much eye catching for first time users.

review_title: Great features and very user friendly.
description: Overall experience was good., I will love to continue using it. This software is much user friendly and feature rich as compared to other statistical softwares.
author: Gurjot D.
pros: It has almost all the functions needed for statistical analysis. Much easier to perform the analysis than using excel or other softwares. It also asks for the particular data needed for the required for the analysis, feature not seen in other softwares.
cons: I do not have a lot of cons to list. My overall experience was positive. Only thing I can mention is that it takes some time to learn. But once learned, it is quite easy.

review_title: Great Value and Great Customer Support
description: Overall, the experience has been very positive. It is easy to use. Customer support is great, and the value proposition for EngineRoom cannot be beaten.
author: Ryan P.
pros: Customer Support has been fantastic. Whenever, I was hung up on something, MoreSteam helped me right away by scheduling a meeting with me and talking me through it. I love how Process Playground is tied into EngineRoom. It allows me to jump from data analysis to event simulations seamlessly.
cons: Although the process of doing the analysis is relatively straight forward and easy. There is a learning curve with what the tool is needing to do the analysis. I have had experience with SigmaXL and Minitab so retraining my brain to fit EngineRoom was an initial challenge. However, it is easy to overcome and now it is easy to do everything I need.

review_title: Minitab Convert - Cost Effective Alternative
description: I have been happy with EngineRoom, I don't need to do data analysis daily, more like 3-4 times a month so it's a cost effective alternative to Minitab and I can see that it is fairly easy to learn to use and offers more tools than I have used so far.
author: Liz K.
pros: Engineroom provides great value for money, I grew up using Minitab which was no longer affordable for my company and so far I have been pleased with my experience with EngineRoom. As a long time Minitab user, the learning curve is likely higher than it would be for a newbie because I continue to think the way I previously worked but it has still been quite easy to learn and use for my data analysis needs. I also enjoy how it provides other Lean Six Sigma tools to make my job easier!
cons: There are gaps that I am still getting used to compared to Minitab. Lots of tools but not all of my favorite tools and logging in for me is a nuisance, often having to reset password. As someone who was used to using stats within a network without log in, that's been a con for me. For someone not used to a networked tool or better as tracking passwords or who uses it daily, probably not a big deal.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Minority Report capable system
description: Very practical and functional and easy to learn
author: Will S.
pros: Ease of use- its touch screen capable statistics! (Always reminds me of the movie "Minority Report")
cons: no major complaints. It might be cool to have a "lite" version for lower level staff to experience and geared for them.

review_title: Overall use of EngineRoom
description: Very good. Especially the Technical support.
author: Chris A.
pros: EngineRoom is specifically designed for Six Sigma and more. This makes using the software easy to lecture and train.
cons: Actually nothing. In the beginning of 2019, I started using EngineRoom and found that there were a few thigs EngineRoom did not provide e.g., Response Optimiser etc. However, in the 5 years I've been using the EngineRoom the software has developed very well.

review_title: Take your process improvement to the next level
description: It hasn't been intuitive for me; however, persevering through the learning curve has made it my go-to application when faced with challenges greater than trivial. The MoreSteam team bends over backwards to provide support and opportunities to sharpen one's skills (I particularly appreciate "Modeling Mondays," short worked out examples of different Process Playground models featuring techniques for building specific functionalities). Overall, it's been a real find and a valuable addition to my bag of tricks.
author: Tim A.
pros: I like three things about EngineRoom compared to other packages. First, it's a comprehensive set of process improvement tools all seamlessly integrated into one package. Second, it's well supported by on-demand tutorials and training webinars. Lastly, it includes Process Playground - a discrete event simulator useful in building a digital twin of your processes and systems. There are insights about your business you just can't gather any other way.
cons: There's a pretty steep learning curve to understanding how all the bits and pieces work together. In addition, becoming competent with Process Playground requires an intermediate level of familiarity with statistical distributions and systems engineering concepts. This is not to say it's out of reach for the casual user; however, you have to really want it.

review_title: rock and rolling with engine room software, you can't go wrong
description: fantastic, the very best, could not be a better software for decision making and data analysis that provides customer and business data support
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: customer support is fantastic, provides excellent data for decision making, we have come a long way from using a simple spreadsheet
cons: nothing is just to modern and our previous tools do not compare, its like comparing a donkey with a f1 sports car.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A powerful and accessible tool for process improvement.
description: Overall, my experiencie with EngineRoom has been very positive. It has simplified how we approach data analysis and process improvement within our team.
author: Erick G.
pros: I really liked the drag and drop interface, I find it incredibly intuitive, making it much easier to use complex statistical tools without the need of being an expert.
cons: While it is intuitive on the use of tools, the initial learning curve to get the most out of the statistical functions can be a bit steep.

review_title: Excellent, easy to learn program
description: Overall, I am very pleased with EngineRoom. I learned a lot of useful information that I have used multiple times at my job.
author: Caleb T.
pros: I enjoyed the lessons and the ability to apply what I learned in a sandbox-style environment. The lessons were clear and concise and able to be completed at your own pace.
cons: I think a few of the lessons, especially the later ones, started to drag on. I feel like each one covered more than one topic and started to jumble together. I wish they were broken up a bit better.

review_title: Engine Room Yellow Belt
author: Vincent Y.
pros: Very intuitive and easy to learn on. Enjoyed the built in AI features. Great tool for my Lean Six Sigma project and the data we collected for analysis.
cons: Nothing i can recall at this time. It was easy to use and navigate. Appreciated the features and simplicity.

review_title: EngineRoom review Q3 2025
description: I had a wonderful and comprehensive User Experience with EngineRoom during my lean yellow belt training. The exercises could be done directly on dashboard data that provide the context or offline exporting data to Excel. The latter file management based approach let you figure out a great value for money invested, by purchasing a product ready to provide great customer support. Several Data Dashboards are customizable to create the proper work environment.
author: Marco T.
pros: EngineRoom has softened the learning curve of a lean methodology training organized by my company. This thanks to a great user experience and consistent samples on data analysis.
cons: In one occasion I had to retake the exercise from the beginning due to an unexpected crash. Maybe this can be covered by some session saving on the cloud.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Engine Room - A Software Conducive for an Optimal Virtual Learning Experience
description: The EngineRoom is the wave of the future for virtual training, which our students agreed was conducive to allow them the flexibility of completing their required sessions timely, along with meeting their work responsibilities and duties.
author: Lisa R.
pros: There are many aspects of the Engine Room that are essential for optimal project completion such as utilizing key lean tools within the application, statistical and data analytics, process mapping and videos to enhance the overall learning experience. The most enjoyable part of EngineRoom is the ease of use within the software which is very important for virtual learning.
cons: Some of the feedback received from the students are the questions and the actual correct answers at the end of each session can be based on individual interpretation.

review_title: Great for data analysis, super useful dashboards!
author: Irma J.
pros: EngineRoom has been a really helpful tool in my day-to-day work. What I love most is how easy it makes data analysis—no need to be a stats expert or write code.
cons: Limited customization for charts Some features are locked behind higher-tier plans Doesn’t integrate easily with other tools like Excel or Power BI
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: General Review
description: Really happy with the overall progress so far. Would definitely recommend to peers and partners within an organization
author: AMARNATH K.
pros: The Content provided and the interface makes it easy for understanding data and creating dashboards.
cons: A bit expensive although worth it, also too much content to deal with at one single time can be a bit trcky.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Engine Room Supports Excellent Lean Practice
description: Great team/organizational tool for Lean improvement projects!
author: Patsy M.
pros: I have used Engine Room with many many teams across many projects. It has allowed teams to work seamlessly with various documents and tools as well as provided an excellent foundation for data analysis. It is also an extremeley affordable tool..
cons: There is not yet an enterprise version, but I believe it is in the works

review_title: Engine room review green & black belt projects
description: Positive experience and has helped me given direction to my green and black belt projects
author: Jason A.
pros: Very easy to use and helpful in highlight test results once you have got past the initial phase of using the software, lots of instruction as well incase you are struggling and not sure what to do. Fav. item is DOE , i have a planned project for that and that will give our company insights that we have never looked into before
cons: Only item is that its web based so you need a connection to be able to use

review_title: Engine room Review
author: Jason D.
pros: I overall found the software to be very user friendly. A little intimidating at first but with practice was able to make better decisions.
cons: I feel that a prompt for information based on the files would have been more helpful at least for me as I had issues deciding which charts to use. But I feel that was my own shortcoming.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: EngineRoom is more than just a training package
description: After going through a training class, I repeatedly ran into things in my projects that were easier to do through EngineRoom. I even had to reference something I did in EngineRoom a year later and it was still there and easily accessible. While I know I don't use all of it's functionality, and I could probably even use it more than I do, I am glad I have it at my disposal when I do need it.
author: Galen G.
pros: The various functions are already set up and ready to sort the data. The main functionality needed for a good analysis of the data is right there in a ribbon and easy to access. The data is easy to sort through if you take the time to label things for future reference.
cons: Due to the nature of statistical analysis, if you don't have a little bit of training in that field, you will be confused and feel lost as you go through some of the functions. There are also some limitations built in due to the expectation for printing or use intent. When I have tried to adapt a tool for something it wasn't explicitly designed for, it doesn't always come out the way I wanted.
